name: Vedant Mishra
tagline: Building impactful software at the intersection of web, AI, and embedded systems.
about: I'm a 4th-year Computer Science student at KIIT University, passionate about building real-world solutions through software, robotics, and AI. I specialize in full-stack web development using modern frameworks and have hands-on experience with embedded systems and autonomous robotics. My projects have been showcased at premier tech fests at IIT Patna and IIT Kharagpur, reflecting my drive for innovation and continuous learning.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

experience.title: Open Source Contributor
experience.description: Contributing to the Stack Room platform — a developer community tool for collaborative learning and resource sharing.

experience.title: Robotics Developer
experience.organization: IIT Patna & IIT Kharagpur Tech Fests
experience.description: Designed and built autonomous robots (Track Tracer, Sand Rover, Droid Blitz) using Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and sensor arrays. Competed in national-level robotics competitions.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Building full-stack applications including a stock trading simulator, AI-powered chatbot, and student grade management system.
